summary: First-finish smoke test for Team Pillbox MVP. Backend public + admin endpoints respond correctly; all major UI flows (home, staff search/filter, gallery lightbox, announcements, application submit, login good/bad, admin tab switching, application approval, auth protection on /admin) pass. One minor deviation: logout redirects to /login instead of '/'.
passed: POST /api/auth/login with admin creds returns user + sets cookie (200)
POST /api/applications accepts {full_name, discord_id, age, timezone(alias), desired_role, experience, why_join} -> 200 with status=pending
Homepage shows hero, Join EMS, Discord button, stats grid (active staff=6)
Staff page: 6 cards initially; search 'Sam' filters to 1
Gallery: 6 photos, lightbox opens and closes via testids
Admin sidebar tabs switch: staff, applications, gallery, announcements, idcards, certificates, settings
Applications tab shows submitted application; approve button works
Visiting /admin while logged out redirects to /login

failed.issue: Logout redirects to /login instead of '/' as specified in the requirements

observations: Admin Dashboard stat-card numeric values appeared blank in the post-login screenshot (only the divider line visible under each label). API /api/admin/stats does return valid counts, so this may be a rendering/CSS issue worth a quick visual check. Not blocking.
action_items: Optional: update logout handler to navigate to '/' instead of '/login' to match spec.
Optional: verify Admin Dashboard stat numbers render visibly (color/contrast or binding issue).
